assessment.note: She pivoted from who should see the impact to feedback on communication she is still processing, which signals unresolved expectation/feedback clarity and mild engagement drag.

new_queue.label: Communication feedback
new_queue.name: That communication feedback — what part of it are you still processing?
new_queue.description: Clarifies the specific feedback thread she introduced and where the uncertainty sits.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Support asked for
new_queue.name: What do you want from me that would actually change your week?
new_queue.description: Clarifies the manager support Nina wants in practical terms, not vague reassurance.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've talked about, what's your priority for the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into a concrete near-term commitment.
